meaning: adj.舞台的,布景的,景色优美的,戏剧性的n.风景照片,风景影片
examples: I pulled off the road at a scenic overlook.
This is an extremely scenic part of America.
They will not be on the 5A scenic spot list.
Jackson, nestled in the scenic town of Bar Harbor, Maine, is in the mouse business.
Most pensions are in scenic locations, tucked away in greenery-cloaked hills or near the ocean.
